rationale: This page is a Table of Contents (TOC) for the PT 365 Polity, Governance and Social Issues document, covering sections 7.6 through 9.7. It also contains a large advertisement for a coaching foundation course. As a TOC page, it does not contain substantive content for generating study questions.
